title: Support SV implicit named ports and C-type array sizes.

features.name: implicit named port connection in module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where port connections use implicit named port syntax (.name instead of .name(signal)) where names match
features.snippet:
module child(input clk, data); endmodule
module top(); child c(.clk, .data); endmodule

features.name: C-style unpacked array dimension
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration using C-style sizing where the dimension is specified as a single number instead of range
